description_long: This is a compact, tactical shotgun with a predominantly matte black finish and a robust, modern design. The body features a cylindrical barrel with a series of vented slots and a ribbed top rail, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The grip is angular and textured for enhanced handling, and the trigger guard is squared and reinforced, providing protection and stability. A box magazine is attached below the barrel, with visible gold-colored shells or cartridges. The rear of the shotgun has a prominent cocking handle and a short, stubby stock, optimized for close-quarters use. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability and functionality in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a ribbed top rail, box magazine, and angular textured grip. Features include a vented barrel, squared trigger guard, and short stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the ribbed top rail, box magazine, angular grip, and cocking handle at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, ribbed top rail, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the box magazine, trigger guard, and the detailed grip texture.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the cocking handle, short stock, and the alignment of the top rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented slots and a ribbed top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, medium-sized trigger guard with reinforced edges and a straight profile
